name: JetProfile300LT

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: CA11CD16-1079-4012-9BE8-423A898DABE8

comment: The Jet Profile300LT is a compact, quiet, and versatile moving LED profile designed for small to medium stages in theater, television, and live performances. Featuring a 300W white LED source and a long-throw optical system, it delivers a robust 12.000 lumen output.

gwSpecs.description: The Jet Profile300LT is a compact, quiet, and versatile moving LED profile designed for small to medium stages in theater, television, and live performances. Featuring a 300W white LED source and a long-throw optical system, it delivers a robust 12.000 lumen output.
